PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, JOSE OSCAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $5,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,750.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF.
